series_metadata.series_description: Authorizes payment to another state agency for goods and/or services received and serves as the basis for disbursing funds

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor or State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor or State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy, Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Erase
